title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Mphasis

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Mphasis
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Mphasis in Srinagar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mphasis:
Mphasis is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mphasis!
